arts.ttl: Newcastle United line up Celtic friendly with summer date revealed
arts.sum: Howe, who was in the middle of hiatus after leaving AFC Bournemouth, was set to take the job at the 54-time Scottish champions after Neil Lennon resigned in February of the same year. Newcastle United will travel to Scotland to play Celtic in a pre-season friendly next summer, according to reports.

arts.ttl: Newcastle sent transfer price warning for wonderkid they've tracked since 2022
arts.sum: Southampton manager Russell Martin has sent a January transfer price warning for Newcastle United target Tyler Dibling. Dibling emerged as a target when he scored a hat-trick for Southampton's 4-2 Premier League 2 win over the Magpies in April 2022 at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: Team News: Newcastle United vs. Leicester City injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Newcastle United and Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Leicester predicted XI v Newcastle with van Nistelrooy to make three changes
arts.sum: Skipp came off the bench for Ndidi in the draw with Brighton last weekend, but for Choudhury, a start at Newcastle would represent his first inclusion in a Premier League 11 this term. Ruud van Nistelrooy has to bring in at least two new players with his starting midfield duo from last week’s fixtures, Wilfred Ndidi and Boubakary Soumare, both out.

arts.ttl: Sean Longstaff's Newcastle United transfer stance as surprise destination catches the eye
arts.sum: Chronicle Live understands the midfielder has no great desire to leave Newcastle and it would take an attractive offer from an established Premier League club in and around the top half of the table - or a surprise move to the MLS - to begin to change that stance. The academy graduate, who featured 46 times for Eddie Howe's side last term, remains one of the Newcastle boss' favoured options but with the north east outfit hampered by top flight spending regulations they are attempting to become better sellers, which in turn means speculation lingers over Longstaff and a handful of other senior players.

arts.ttl: The PIF message to Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe ahead of three crucial games
arts.sum: Speaking before the crunch game against Leicester City at home tomorrow, Howe said: "I don’t seek it (assurances) I’m not that type of person. The week that was saw the Tyneside public digest a disappointing defeat at the Gtech Community Stadium which now leaves Newcastle sitting on just two wins from 11 outings and in 12th place in the table.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United vs Leicester predictions as Sutton and Merson say the same thing
arts.sum: "It’s true that Leicester have four points in two games under Ruud van Nistelrooy and that’s a good start. Newcastle United must start showing some consistency if they want to move up the Premier League - but Eddie Howe's side have been backed to avoid another home mishap this weekend.

arts.ttl: 'I don't like' - Newcastle United make bombshell admission as Callum Wilson alternative found - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has admitted it will be 'close to' impossible for Newcastle United to find a player like Callum Wilson in the transfer market given the restrictions the club face. Wilson has been 'outwardly emotional' to Howe, who has seen the striker's 'hurt', after the former England international spent a period of time away from his family to get fit earlier this season.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Leicester Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Newcastle will aim to turn their Premier League fortunes around when they host Leicester on Saturday afternoon. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predict...

arts.ttl: Newcastle make 27-year-old ace available for transfer due to PSR rules
arts.sum: Newcastle United are prepared to cash in on Sean Longstaff during the January transfer window. According to Daily Mail, they are prepared to listen to offers for the 27-year-old due to the PSR regulations. Sporting director Paul Mitchell has been asked to improve the club’s financial situation and the Magpies are now looking to balance […] The post Newcastle make 27-year-old ace available for transfer due to PSR rules appeared first on CaughtOffside.
